items.name_en: ❤️Loro piana Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
❤️Loro piana Bucket Bag
Bale Mini Bag
Color: Pale White
Bale's effortless elegance and timeless style once again witness Loro piana's unique heritage. The square shape and name originate from the large bales used to store cashmere, representing Loro piana's commitment to exquisite craftsmanship. The body is made of calfskin with a very soft natural grain.
Size: 16✖️14✖️23CM

items.name_en: A spacious Catherine bag, crafted from selected large-scale brand plaid and smooth Italian tanned leather. Geometric pieces paired with the brand logo, inspired by the collar shape of a classic Trench coat. Debuted at Burberry Fall/Winter Women's Collection, named after the founder's wife (mother of 6 children). Features a reinforced leather handle or a detachable shoulder strap. At least 30% of the main materials are bio-based, derived from plants and castor oil. 28 x 13 x 23cm. Top leather handle. Detachable adjustable shoulder strap. Zipper closure with side snap buttons. 2 external flap pockets, 2 internal slip pockets. Hand-painted edges. Glossy metal hardware. Front embossed Burberry logo

items.name_en: A❤【Ostrich Black】
items.name_cn:
A❤【Ostrich Black】
Loro Piana Extra pocket L19 Series Bestseller
A life without definition is the most comfortable, just like Loro Piana's material and design. Styles without complex designs, with simple and soft contours that are elegant and timeless, like a exquisite makeup case, perfectly balancing aesthetics and functionality. The leather is fine, feeling as soft as butter. The compact body has a large capacity. It can be carried by hand with a thin strap or crossbody. Sisters who love minimalist style can get this one. Simple and versatile, the simpler, the more unique. Celebrities and influencers are raving about it. It's hard not to love it with such rare leather.
Size: Small: 19×7×12cm

items.name_en: B brand pure original hot 🔥 TB series 'KINGDOM'. Clean and sharp lines, the texture and beauty are super impressive, unintentionally high-end. The gold logo with glossy cowhide is simply retro. This style isn't common, has high recognition, good texture, and easy to match. Do you guys like it?😽 21 x 6 x 16 cm

items.name_en: B brand pure original olive green shoulder bag, underarm bag. Absolutely factory original! 100% all-imported fabric with cowhide. The adjustable strap can be lengthened. The strap features Burberry letter embroidery in jacquard. Also comes with a detachable handle for crossbody or hand carry. The flap has a magnetic snap, very secure. Perfect quality and details! Dimensions: 24 x 8 x 14 cm
